author: mayor
text: CONTEXT: feature_audit shows 994/1000 agents are Villagers. Fix military training.

author: mayor
text: Investigate: (1) FighterTrain in src/scripted/fighter.nim - conditions/prerequisites. (2) Training options in src/scripted/options.nim - cost checks. (3) USE action on Barracks/ArcheryRange/Stable in src/step.nim. Determine if AI never decides to train, cant afford it, action fails, or units die. Fix so multiple unit classes appear. Verify: TV_AUDIT_STEPS=3000 ./scripts/feature_audit should show ManAtArms, Archers, Knights, Scouts in unit composition.

author: mayor
text: Default config has VictoryNone. Change to VictoryAll. Also 0 relics on map - check spawn.nim for relic placement. If no relic spawning exists, add it (5-7 relics on neutral ground). Verify victory states track wonder/relic/regicide/KOTH. Run feature_audit to confirm.

author: mayor
text: Dock not in builder TechBuildingKinds so never built. Add Dock to builder building list. Ensure placement works near water tiles. Verify naval training works. Note: Dock buildIndex=6, already in action space. Run feature_audit to confirm docks appear.

author: mayor
text: Universities (4-7) and Castles (1) built but 0 techs researched. AI has no research option. Add AI options for University and Castle tech research via USE action. Wire into builder or fighter option lists. Check step.nim USE handler for research mechanics. Run feature_audit to confirm tech counts > 0.

author: mayor
text: 0 monks alive despite 2-6 Monasteries built. Investigate: does FighterMonk option ever fire? Is monk training cost prohibitive? Depends on tv-5ews (military training fix) since monks are military units trained at Monastery. Also verify MonkRelicCollect works if relics exist (see tv-qnbk). Run feature_audit to confirm monks > 0.

author: tribal_village/polecats/furiosa
text: Fixed: FighterLanterns (canStart=true for all villagers) had higher priority than FighterTrain, blocking all military training. Moved FighterTrain above FighterLanterns in FighterOptions. Also added ready-queue awareness so villagers collect pre-paid trained units. Result: 60-87 military units per game (up from 14). ManAtArms, Archers, Scouts, Knights now appear.

author: tribal_village/polecats/furiosa
text: Work verified complete. Previous session's fix (FighterTrain prioritized over FighterLanterns) is merged to main. Feature audit confirms: ManAtArms, Archers, Scouts, LightCavalry, LongSwordsman, Monks all being trained. 116 military units from Fighter role. All tests pass.

author: mayor
text: Root cause: gatherer.nim early-game gold weight=1.5 (worst). Mining Camp gate=6 nodes (too high). Fix: weight 1.5->0.8, minCount 6->3, initial spawns 3-4->5-7. Validation: feature_audit gold >100/team.

author: mayor
text: AI option completely missing. Create ResearchUnitUpgradeOption in options.nim mirroring University/Castle pattern (lines 1025-1104). Register in BuilderOptions builder.nim position 13. Costs: tier2=3F/2G, tier3=6F/4G.

author: mayor
text: Wall cost 1 wood, no cap, perpetual activation. Fix: Add MaxWallsPerTeam (~60) in constants.nim, check in canStartBuilderWallRing (builder.nim:291).

author: mayor
text: ai_core.nim line 1461: blocked returns NOOP. Fix: check spatial index for adjacent enemies first. Secondary: lower greedy->A* threshold 6->4 tiles (line 1411).

author: mayor
text:
Economy techs beyond Wheelbarrow/HandCart never fire. AI has ResearchEconomyTechOption in builder options but only Wheelbarrow and HandCart get researched (4-6 per episode). Farming techs (HorseCollar, HeavyPlow, CropRotation) and resource techs (DoubleBitAxe, BowSaw, GoldMining, GoldShaftMining, StoneMining, StoneShaftMining) never research.

Check scripted/options.nim for the existing economy tech research option. It likely iterates economy techs but the AI never has enough resources or the check order skips farming/mining techs. Ensure all economy tech types are reachable by the existing option. The research happens at Mill (farming), LumberCamp (wood), MiningCamp (gold), Quarry (stone), TownCenter (wheelbarrow/handcart).

Validation: Run feature_audit.nim 3000 steps - economy techs should include Horse Collar, Double Bit Axe, Gold Mining. make test-nim passes.

author: mayor
text:
Only 3 of 45 unit classes trained: ManAtArms, Scout, Archer. Knights, Skirmishers, CavalryArchers, Camels, siege units never appear. 

The fighter role in scripted/fighter.nim handles training via optFighterTrainUnit or similar. Check what units the AI considers training. The training logic likely only queues basic units at Barracks/Stable/ArcheryRange. Need to add:
- Knights at Stable (cost: 3F/2G) - should be trained once gold economy improves
- Skirmishers at ArcheryRange (counter archers)
- CavalryArcher at ArcheryRange
- Camel at Stable (counter cavalry)
- BatteringRam at SiegeWorkshop (counter buildings)

Check scripted/fighter.nim for unit training selection logic and expand the unit roster. Also check if training buildings exist but their unit catalog is limited.

Validation: feature_audit.nim should show >6 unit classes trained. make test-nim passes.

author: mayor
text:
Monks train (1-3 per episode) but never pick up relics. 16-17 relics exist on the map, monasteries built (2-6), but 0 relics garrisoned. This blocks the relic victory condition entirely.

Need a monk-specific behavior option:
1. Find nearest relic on map (background grid item Relic)
2. Move monk to relic, USE action to pick up
3. Find nearest friendly Monastery
4. Move to monastery, USE to garrison relic inside

Check if monks already have a relic behavior in scripted/fighter.nim or scripted/options.nim. The relic pickup mechanic exists in step.nim (USE on relic tile). Monastery garrison mechanic exists (USE on monastery while carrying relic).

This should be a Fighter role option since monks are military units. Add to FighterOptions with high priority when team has monks and relics exist.

Validation: feature_audit.nim should show relics garrisoned >0. make test-nim passes.

author: mayor
text: Feature audit (seed 42, 5000 steps): 7 blacksmiths built but 0 blacksmith upgrade levels researched. Check if blacksmith research is in builder priority array and whether cost/prerequisite check passes.

author: mayor
text: Feature audit: 0 wonders built despite late-game economies. Wonder requires 6W+2S+3G. Check if Wonder is in BuildingPriorityOrder and if cost is prohibitive.

author: mayor
text: Feature audit: 1 dock built but 0 naval alive. 58 boats trained but all died. Check boat fragility (Galley 30HP/5atk), stuck boats, or overly aggressive naval combat. MaxNavalPerTeam=3 in fighter.nim.
